product_depth.justification: Both manifests correctly declare two-plugin architecture with complete metadata. Install scripts handle both plugins with graceful fallback.

functionality.justification: Marketplace has 2 entries. Codex skills is array of 2 paths. Install scripts copy from both plugins and uninstall removes both. Hooks merge preserved.

visual_design.justification: JSON formatted with 2-space indent. Script output messages clear and consistent.

code_quality.justification: Both JSON files parse without errors. Scripts handle missing directories gracefully. Consistent variable naming and code style.

contract_checks.evidence: codex plugin.json skills is array with 2 paths
install.sh references plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills with copy loop
install.bat references plugins\harness-sdlc-suite\skills with copy loop
install.bat --uninstall removes all 6 domain skill directories
node -e JSON.parse succeeds for both files

feature_evidence.reason: marketplace.json has 2 plugin entries: harness (./plugins/harness, v2.0.0) and harness-sdlc-suite (./plugins/harness-sdlc-suite, v2.0.0). Both include name, source, description, version, author, metadata.
codex plugin.json skills is array ['./plugins/harness/skills/', './plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills/']. Version 2.0.0. Description reflects two-plugin architecture.

install.sh and install.bat both copy from plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills/. Both create directories for all 6 suite skills. Both --uninstall removes all skill directories. Hooks merge and agents/commands copy preserved unchanged.

test_results.coverage: N/A -- manifest and script updates, validated via JSON parse and grep

internal_consistency.justification: Both manifests share consistent author, repository, and versioning. Install scripts use matching skill lists.

intentionality.justification: Marketplace entries have distinct descriptions reflecting core vs suite roles. Install scripts gracefully handle missing suite directory.

craft.justification: JSON formatting consistent. Script code style follows existing conventions.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: Manifests work with Claude Code marketplace and Codex CLI discovery. Install scripts provide complete local setup for both plugins.
